Isaac development discussion, sisters enthusiastic about $150K offer concept

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Matt and Chandler moving back into property to make updates and repairs. Plan to relist when ready. 208 DOM, underwater by $93K-$143K. Chandler laid off, hardship documented.

Critical: 208 DOM, underwater, 717 Jack Nicklaus listed at $519K makes pricing impossible

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path

deals.title: 485 W FM 462 (Colton Brown)
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres, Frio County. Payoff $257K (May 2026). Needs $285K-$290K minimum to walk with proceeds. Divorce situation, needs to sell. Recommended list $295K-$315K range.

Divorce situation, finish renovation and sell, Colton looking for contractor work
